question: What is the penalty for submitting work more than 7 days late?
final_answer: According to our late work policy, if a submission is more than 7 days late, it will not be accepted and the student will receive a grade of 0. This penalty applies regardless of any prior approval for an extension. The policy clearly states that submissions beyond this timeframe will not be graded or considered for credit.
